titleStmt.title: SII 16.221: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 221. (A.R. No. 333 of 1922.) KŌSUVĀRIPALLE, MADANAPALLI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the east prākāra of the Veṅkaṭaramaṇasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1479, Piṅgaḷa, Nija-Jyēshṭha śu. 12, corresponding to 1557 A.D., June 8.

This damaged epigraph seems to record an endowment of the income from the villages Kōsuvāripalli, Goḍugubba, Mudalidoḍḍi etc., towards provisions for various offerings to god Mallikārjuna of Kōsuvāripalle by Umāpati, the kāryakarta of Māhāmaṇḍalēśvara Mūrtirāju Viṭhaladēva-mahārāju.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1479 Agunēṭi piṁgaḷa saṁvatsara nijajēṣa śu 12 puṁṇyakālamaṁdu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrī vīra sadāsivadē
vamahārāyalu vidyānagara ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhuḍayi prithivisāmrāṁjyaṁ cēyucuṁḍḍagānu śrī kāśiviśvanāthāya namaḥ . śrī kayilāsapuravarādhīśvaruṁḍayuṁḍi śrī kōsuvāri palleki veṁ
cēyanavadhariṁcina śrī mallikhārjunadēvuni dēdīpyamānadivyaśrīpādapadmaṁbulaku śrīmaṁ mahāmaṁḍalēśvara mūrtirāju viṭhaladēvamahārājulayyavāri kāryyakarttulayina Umā patigāru sadvinayabha
yabhaktiniṁnni sāṣṭāṁgamulugānu Anaṁttamulayina daṁḍapraṇāmamulucēsi Iccina dāna śāsanakramameṭlaṁnnanu kōsuvāripalli goḍugubbagrāmaṁ mudali doḍḍi modalayina staḷālanu poliŪṭu veṭina
tula rcanaku rokhamunnu biyyamu bellamu pōṁka lākulu sahāgānu svāmi mī divyacittamukaligina Āragiṁcca Amrutapaḷlaku dīpārādhana naivēdyālakuṁ nī kuṁnu mūrtirāju
viṭhalarājayavāriki puṇyaṁgānu svāmi saṁnidhini dhāravōsi samarppiṁci Iccina dharmma śāsanaṁ . I dhaṁrmmānaku yavvaru tappinānu tama tallitaṁḍrulanu vāraṇāsilō vadhiṁcina dōṣāna bōduru gōhatya braṁhatya
Digital edition of SII 16.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
